title: Chain 1/8: Ask in a Store
scene: 你在便利店问附近地铁站怎么走。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，最近的地铁站在哪？
turns.en: Excuse me, where's the nearest subway station?

turns.cn: 出门左转，走两个路口就到。
turns.en: Left out the door, two blocks down.
Which line is it?
Line six. You'll see signs at the entrance.
Thank you!

title: Chain 2/8: On the Bus
scene: 你坐公交不确定在哪下车。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Which stop is Central Park?
Fifth stop. I'll let you know.
Do I need to pull the cord?
Better pull it. Sometimes we skip if no signal.
Okay. Thanks.

title: Chain 3/8: Taxi Ride
scene: 你打车去朋友家，给司机指路。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: One twenty-eight Park Road?

turns.cn: 对，在第三个红绿灯右转。
turns.en: Yes. Turn right at the third traffic light.
The blue apartment building?

turns.cn: 对，门口有棵大树，在那停。
turns.en: Yes. Big tree out front. Drop me there.
We're here. Twenty dollars.
Thanks. Keep the change.

title: Chain 4/8: Subway Exit
scene: 你出地铁后找不到出口，问工作人员。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 去现代艺术博物馆走哪个出口？
turns.en: Which exit for the Museum of Modern Art?

turns.cn: B 出口，上去后往北走。
turns.en: Exit B. Head north when you come up.
How far is it?
Five minutes. It's across the street.
Got it. Thank you.

title: Chain 5/8: Map App Confusion
scene: 导航把你带到死胡同，你向路人确认。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 手机导航说在这转，但路封了，图书馆怎么走？
turns.en: My app says turn here, but the road's closed. How do I get to the library?

turns.cn: 施工呢，往回走绕到主街。
turns.en: Construction. Go back and loop around to Main Street.
Main Street east, right?

turns.cn: 对，过两个路口看见钟楼左转。
turns.en: Yes. Two blocks past the clock tower, turn left.
Thanks a lot. Almost went the wrong way.

title: Chain 6/8: Find Parking
scene: 你开车到市区找停车位。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Is parking easy around here?

turns.cn: 街边难，后面有个车库，入口在巷子里。
turns.en: Street parking's tough. Garage in the back, entrance in the alley.
About how much per hour?
Eight bucks. Cheaper after six.
Okay. I'll try that. Thanks.

title: Chain 7/8: Lost in the Mall
scene: 你在大型商场里找不到朋友说的餐厅。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 日式拉面店在几楼？叫一风堂。
turns.en: Which floor is the ramen place? Ippudo.

turns.cn: 四楼美食区，扶梯上去左转。
turns.en: Fourth floor food court. Up the escalator, turn left.
Is the wait long?

turns.cn: 饭点大概二十分钟，可以先取号。
turns.en: About twenty minutes at peak. You can get a number first.
Okay. Thanks for the directions.

title: Chain 8/8: Confirm with Friend
scene: 你快到了，打电话和朋友确认门牌。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Almost here?

turns.cn: 在公园路了，是 45 号还是 45B？
turns.en: I'm on Park Road. Is it forty-five or forty-five B?
Forty-five B. Side entrance, blue doorbell.
I see it. Two minutes.
Door's unlocked. Just come up.
Okay. Be right there.
